description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementation for Microsoft Teams integration, providing capabilities to read messages, create messages, reply to messages, mention members.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'get_member_by_name' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'list_members' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'start_thread' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Restrict tool capabilities to the minimum required. Audit each declared permission (exec, network, db, fs) and remove any not strictly necessary.
